## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize SOW pricing and timeline to enable contract signature.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Pricing Confirmed:** Phase 1 is $30k; Phase 2 is $12k/mo with quarterly billing.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [**Timeline Set:** Phase 1 runs Nov 17, 2025–Feb 16, 2026 (3 months), with a Dec 23–Jan 6 holiday pause.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [**SOW Update:** Tyler will add specific start/end dates to the SOW for Mithil's finance team.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**Signature Process:** Mithil will route the DocuSign internally, then send to Arcel at growthx.ai by EOD Nov 7.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

## Topics

### SOW Pricing & Timeline

  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** $30,000 (confirmed).](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** $12,000/month (confirmed for quarterly billing).](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
          - [*[Note: This resolves a discrepancy with Tyler's notes, which listed $12.5k for quarterly billing vs. $15k for monthly.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)*](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [**Kickoff:** Nov 17, 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [**Phase 1 Duration:** 3 months (Nov 17, 2025–Feb 16, 2026).](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
          - [*[Rationale: The extra month provides ample time to accommodate the holiday pause.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)*](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
      - [**Holiday Pause:** Dec 23, 2025–Jan 6, 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [**Phase 2 Start:** Feb 17, 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### SOW Update & Signature Process

  - [**SOW Update:** Tyler will add specific start/end dates to the SOW for Mithil's finance team.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [*[Rationale: Enables finance to budget for the total cost and duration.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)*](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [Mithil's team will update the document directly if dates require adjustment.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Signature Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [**Mithil's Internal Process:** Legal approval (complete) → VP signature (pending) → DocuSign sent.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [**Recipient:** Arcel at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - [**Target:** DocuSign sent by EOD Nov 7, 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Update SOW with confirmed pricing and start/end dates.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**Mithil:** Secure VP signature and send DocuSign to Arcel by EOD Nov 7, 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/aUdat7sicijYpPtziws_F6-hKC5_LBXU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
